headline: Popular pasta chain closes 20 more restaurants
summary: Even the biggest, most successful restaurant chains close locations regularly. Starbucks, for example, closes hundreds of locations every few years. That's because populations shift, rents increase, and other factors change that make a once-viable restaurant no longer profitable. The coffee chain, ...

headline: Is Starbucks (SBUX) Still Attractive After A 27% Year To Date Share Price Climb
summary: If you have ever wondered whether Starbucks at around US$106.60 is still a solid deal or already priced for perfection, you are not alone. The stock has returned 0.8% over the past week, 6.6% over the past month, 27.0% year to date, and 29.3% over the last year, which puts recent price action front and center for anyone thinking about risk and reward. Recent headlines around Starbucks have focused on its position as a global coffee chain and how sentiment around consumer spending and branded...

headline: Starbucks Restructuring Tests Back To Starbucks Turnaround And Margin Hopes
summary: Starbucks announced a major corporate restructuring under its "Back to Starbucks" turnaround program. The plan includes closing multiple US regional support offices and cutting about 300 corporate roles. The company expects a $400 million charge tied to the restructuring and a broader $2 billion cost-saving effort. Starbucks will consolidate US and international support functions and open a new corporate office in Nashville. For investors watching NasdaqGS:SBUX, this move comes with the...
